findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 41 findings from 7 agents into 30 unique findings. Removed 11 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.593); Primary KPI: Unsubscribe Rate (score=3.593); North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.324); User Preference Page for Notification Categories (score=2.971); Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories (score=2.971)

top_priorities.title: User Preference Page for Notification Categories
Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. risk-002 vs feasibility-002: Critical risk of notification delivery failure on Android 14 devices conflicts with the need for reliable notification delivery.; intake-001 vs requirements-008: Privacy risk detected in user data collection conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.; metrics-006 vs requirements-008: Gap in collecting user preference data conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.

evidence.excerpt: Critical risk of notification delivery failure on Android 14 devices conflicts with the need for reliable notification delivery.
Privacy risk detected in user data collection conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.
Gap in collecting user preference data conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.

conflicts.description: Critical risk of notification delivery failure on Android 14 devices conflicts with the need for reliable notification delivery.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize fixing the Android 14 notification delivery issue before implementing new features or changes.
conflicts.reasoning: Ensuring reliable delivery is essential for user engagement and must take precedence over feature development.

conflicts.description: Privacy risk detected in user data collection conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.
conflicts.resolution: Implement strict data anonymization and user consent protocols to ensure compliance while collecting feedback.
conflicts.reasoning: User feedback is essential for improvement, but it must be collected in a way that respects privacy regulations.

conflicts.description: Gap in collecting user preference data conflicts with the requirement to collect user feedback on notification preferences.
conflicts.resolution: Develop a structured approach to gather user preferences while ensuring compliance with privacy standards.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the measurement gap is crucial for optimizing notifications, but it must be done in a compliant manner.

summary: Consolidated 41 findings into 30 unique items. Removed 11 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR).
